name: Football Puzzle Goal
description: Football Puzzle Goal Test your skills in this addictive football puzzle game! Drag, aim, and shoot the ball to score goals while avoiding obstacles, walls, and moving defenders. Each level brings new challenges that require precision, timing, and smart thinking. Features: - 60+ unique levels - Realistic ball physics - Tricky obstacles and defenders - Star-based level system - Unlock cool ball skins - Smooth controls and satisfying gameplay Earn coins by completing levels and watch ads to unlock new skins and boosts! Can you solve every puzzle and become the ultimate goal master? Play now and show your skills!
instructions: Desktop - Mouse drag to aim - Release to shoot Mobile - Swipe to aim - Release to shoot
